title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa?! Ya bagged so many of 'em! I don't even
know if we got space for all of these back home!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...But I know the squirts'll appreciate this. I can
hear 'em now, "Soooo fluffy!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, Trainer, couldja hold these for a sec? I
needa snap a pic.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I gotta show 'em who to thank when they're
huggin' these fluffy beasts.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I gotta show 'em who to thank when they're
huggin' these fluffy beasts.
